title: wolfhsm client.rs: Client struct, connect, echo, info, Drop
description: Create wolfhsm/src/client.rs. Client wraps Pin<Box<wolfhsm_sys::whClientContext>> plus the transport structs (whCommClientConfig, posixTransport*Config, posixTransport*ClientContext, whClientConfig) pinned together via a Box. Must not implement Clone (wolfCrypt CryptoCb stores raw pointer into Client). Must implement Send but not Sync (wolfHSM single-thread client). Methods: connect(transport: Transport) -> Result<Self, WolfHsmError> calls wh_Client_Init; echo(data: &[u8], buf: &mut [u8]) -> Result<usize, WolfHsmError> calls wh_Client_Echo with u16 length clamp and returns actual echo length; info() -> Result<ServerInfo, WolfHsmError> calls wh_Client_CommInfo; Drop: calls wh_Client_Cleanup exactly once. ServerInfo struct holds version, build, cfg_comm_data_len, cfg_nvm_object_count, cfg_keycache_count. All wh_Client_* calls go through error::check(). No key material logged.
